title: Maytenus simonsii
taxonomy: Maytenus simonsii is classified within the family Celastraceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the bittersweet or spindle tree family. The genus Maytenus, to which Maytenus simonsii belongs, is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The classification of Maytenus simonsii further includes its order Celastrales, which is a group of flowering plants known for their showy flowers and woody stems. Maytenus simonsii is often characterized as a shrub or small tree.

The plant's extracts are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its medicinal effects.
